_comment: 2026-06-21: ratcheted up from the temporary 60% floor to the actual CI-measured line coverage (global 92.60%, gated domains 91.8-100% on CI run 27888091563 / 75f2990a). Each floor sits ~1pt below the measured rate as a no-decrease baseline; raise further toward 95 with module-owned tests on the lowest domains (imprint, monitor, ssgf). Branch coverage is tracked ([tool.coverage.run] branch=true); branch-rate gating is the next ratchet step.
